description: RAAS enforcement for Platform Marketing & Content Spine worker (PLAT-003). Sourced from FTC advertising standards, CAN-SPAM Act, state advertising regulations.

hard_stops.label: AI Disclosure Required
hard_stops.logic: All AI-generated marketing content must include disclosure

hard_stops.label: No False Advertising Claims
hard_stops.logic: Marketing content must not contain false, misleading, or unsubstantiated claims per FTC Section 5

hard_stops.label: CAN-SPAM Compliance
hard_stops.logic: Email marketing must include unsubscribe mechanism and physical address per CAN-SPAM Act

hard_stops.label: FTC Testimonial Disclosure
hard_stops.logic: Testimonials and endorsements must include material connection disclosure per FTC Guides

hard_stops.label: No Cross-Tenant Data Leakage
hard_stops.logic: Must never reference or expose data from other tenants

hard_stops.label: Approval Gate Before Publishing
hard_stops.logic: All marketing content requires explicit user approval before publish/send

soft_flags.label: Brand Guidelines Compliance
soft_flags.logic: Warn if content may deviate from uploaded brand guidelines

soft_flags.label: Competitor Mention Review
soft_flags.logic: Flag content mentioning competitors for factual accuracy review

chat_rules.message: Response guarantees marketing results — FTC prohibits unsubstantiated performance claims
Response makes false or defamatory claims about competitors — violates Lanham Act
Response contains unsubstantiated health claims in marketing content
Response contains income guarantees in marketing content — FTC prohibits income claims without substantiation

disclaimer: Marketing content generated by this worker must be reviewed for compliance with FTC advertising standards, CAN-SPAM Act, and applicable state advertising regulations before publication.
